Everyone declares their weight here in stone and the person who has gained the most weight by the 8th of May is the winner. 

The PRIZE: He gets taken to a pub or McDonald his choice and is bought all the food and drinks he can consume. All paid for by the *looser*. 

So take a fat shit and send your weight to enter.
Midnight, but you can post your weight now.
